name: hud_ui_element_copy_from
description: HudUiElement::CopyFrom clears linkage and copies flags, state, timer, position, blit source, and clip rect from the source element without changing the ftable.
known_limits: Binary Ninja reconstruction remains limited because the original compiler copies source->state through a base-pointer optimization that HLIL renders as a synthetic word temporary.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CopyFrom@HudUiElement@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4b4120 still fails: 101 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 86 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes. The mismatch is the same field-copy scheduling/register-shape family as HudUiElement::CopyConstructor.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows no direct callees; assembly clears next/parent, copies flags/state/timer/x/y/bltSource/clipRect, and returns with thiscall cleanup.
The native element copy smoke validates CopyFrom return value, copied scalar fields, copied clip rect, cleared links, and preserved destination ftable.
